title: Sales CRM Custom Selection of Date & Time in Activities for Reminder
excerpt:

posts.author: Shoaibali450 (Shoaib Ali)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dear Monday.com Sales CRM Team,

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to request the addition of a feature that would allow for the custom selection of date and time in the Activities section for reminders. Currently, the system only offers fixed times for setting reminders, which limits flexibility in scheduling and managing tasks.

Adding this functionality would greatly enhance the efficiency and customization options within the CRM.

Thank you for considering this suggestion. I believe it would be a valuable improvement for many users.

Best regards,
Shoaib

posts.author: Dana (Dana Halperin Hoffen)
posts.cookedHtml:
I invite you to check out our Time Based Automations & Reminders app.
The ability so many users were waiting for so long is now available, allowing users to trigger automations and reminders when the item’s exact date and time arrive!

  • You can set the exact time by the minute
  • Endless options of actions you can trigger when the exact time arrives; Send email, notify someone, etc!

You can get the app here.

I’d be happy to assist with any question or assistance.
Feel free to leave a reply here or book a 1:1 call with me using this link.

Best regards,
Dana
